rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §33.260 governs acceptance of gifts, grants, and donations by an agency on behalf of a council. It is wholly unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount.
quote: The agency may accept on behalf of the council a gift, grant, or donation from any source to carry out the purposes of this subchapter.
_note: Rule text concerns gift/grant acceptance authority; no nexus to homestead exemption valuation.
